arts.ttl: 5 Real Madrid players in danger of Champions League suspension for return leg against Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid spent most of their clash with Atletico Madrid pressing high, in part due to the low defensive line set by Diego Simeone. arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham faces punishment after Real Madrid star's X-rated rant at official
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham could be in trouble with La Liga and Spanish FA chiefs after aiming a foul-mouthed rant at an assistant referee early into Saturday's Madrid derby

arts.ttl: City's Savinho ahead of Madrid clash: 'No fear'
arts.sum: Savinho says Manchester City will have no fear when they line up against Real Madrid and revealed there was "calm" in the dressing room when they found out they were facing a blockbuster tie against the Spanish giants.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer another defensive injury blow ahead of Man City clash
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has a raft of defensive injuries to juggle ahead of a trip to Manchester City on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Color Analysis: Unreleased Real Madrid 25-26 Home, Away & Third Kits
arts.sum: So far, Footy Headlines has leaked images of the Real Madrid 25-26 home, away and third kits.

arts.ttl: Sevilla chief: Madrid ref protests 'destroy football'
arts.sum: Sevilla president José María del Nido Carrasco hit out at Real Madrid on Sunday, accusing them of "trying to destroy Spanish football" with their complaints over refereeing decisions.

arts.ttl: Raúl Asencio's rise from ninth choice to Real Madrid linchpin
arts.sum: Raúl Asencio has gone from unknown to Real Madrid starter. Now, he will take on Man City's Erling Haaland in a crucial Champions League playoff.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Real Madrid LIVE: Champions League updates, latest team news, TV, prediction
arts.sum: City take on Champions League holders after scraping into knockout stages

arts.ttl: Florentino Perez halted Real Madrid transfer moves in January due to finances
arts.sum: It is no secret in the Spanish capital that if it were up to Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti, then they would have brought in reinforcements in the January transfer window. It is no surprise that a coach is pushing for more resources, but few sides have faced the injury crises present at Valdebebas. arts.ttl: Manchester City v Real Madrid: Midfielder trained on Sunday, manager gets ‘extra boost’ for CL tie
arts.sum: On Tuesday, Manchester City will host Real Madrid in the Champions League play-off at the Etihad. Los Blancos had to settle for a 1-1 draw against Atlético Madrid at home on Saturday and Eduardo Camavinga came off the bench in the final quarter of the match.
